title: 6H domain audit: Mathématiques
goal: Audit the complete testing-ready Mathématiques collection after all paired cluster reviews. Produce an evidence report covering curriculum gaps/overlaps, three-lens completeness, status honesty, interaction diversity, accessibility risks, and catalog/build integrity without broad mutation authority.
acceptance: The report enumerates every planned cluster and exercise ID in the domain and confirms one construction, one practice, and one transfer-diagnosis record per cluster.
Statement-level mappings show no missing in-scope 5H–6H progression; explicit 6H endpoints and unbanded end-of-cycle expectations remain correctly distinguished.
Every planned record is discoverable with Prototype.svelte and status testing; any exception is a blocking finding rather than an optimistic pass.
The report samples and compares interaction mechanics across clusters, identifies generic reskins or accessibility regressions, and records zero unresolved blocking/high findings for a pass.

The report confirms complete browser evidence for every domain exercise: desktop keyboard and actual 320px touch paths reach incorrect feedback, recovery, correct continuation, and completion while reduced-motion, overflow, storage, and network guards remain clean; any exception is blocking/high.
The report includes exact verification commands and results and does not claim pupil validation.
must_ask_if: Any planned exercise is missing, not testing-ready, incorrectly mapped, or has a blocking/high curriculum, interaction, accessibility, copyright, or lifecycle finding.
Fixing a finding would require mutating an exercise or any file outside the report path; propose a bounded follow-up/replan instead.
